title: Verify network error during pause trial flow
description: Test the system's behavior when a network error occurs while attempting to pause the trial.
preconditions: User is on the Loss Aversion pop-up for pausing

steps.description: 1. Turn on airplane mode or disable network
2. Click the 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access' button

expected_result: An appropriate error message (e.g., 'No internet connection') is displayed. The trial status remains active. The user can retry once the network is restored.
